name: golang-google-protobuf-dev
title: golang-google-protobuf-dev
description:
Go support for protocol buffers (APIv2)
This module (google.golang.org/protobuf) contains Go bindings for protocol
buffers.
.
For APIv2, see https://go.dev/blog/protobuf-apiv2.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-google-protobuf-dev because Go support for protocol buffers (APIv2).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-google-protobuf-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-google-protobuf-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-google-protobuf-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
